name: No Empty Friend Requests
description: For those who hate empty friend reqs (aka me)

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: The timeout for any requests sent to the GD servers

interval.name: Interval
interval.description:
The interval (in seconds) in which the mod will check for empty friend requests

120: 2 minutes, 180: 3 minutes, 240: 4 minutes, 300: 5 minutes, 360: 6 minutes, 420: 7 minutes, 480: 8 minutes, 540: 9 minutes, 600: 10 minutes

cooldown.name: Cooldown
cooldown.description:
The amount of time this will wait after declining a friend request

<cr>Setting this to a low enough value may get you rate limited, be careful!</c>
